# Timescale

**API Collection**

Defined timescale values.

## Timescales

- **kCMTimeMaxTimescale**: The maximum timescale.

## Constants

- **Time**: Defined time values.
- **Dictionary Keys**: Keys to use when working with dictionary representations of time.
